task: Add implied skill coverage governance gate and stabilize routing validation
summary: Introduced automated implied-skill coverage enforcement, fixed registry dependency integrity, and wired the new gate into governance checks.
description: Implemented script-backed implied coverage verification for all on-disk skills, integrated it into routing governance gates and governance:check, and corrected registry metadata/dependency issues that were causing validation and routing threshold failures.

changes.modification: Added dynamic implied coverage analysis and report generation
changes.details: Scans skills/tests, evaluates implied evidence including routing/profile signals and dynamic matrix routing fallback, and exits non-zero on missing skills.

changes.modification: Added implied skill coverage governance gate
changes.details: Appended skill-implied-coverage gate so routing governance now enforces implied coverage checks.

changes.modification: Fixed dependency mismatch and improved routing metadata
changes.details: Corrected learning-engine dependency key and added processPhase/domain/selectionHints metadata to improve evaluator stability and correctness.

changes.modification: Added skills:coverage command and wired into governance:check
changes.details: Ensures implied coverage checker runs in standard governance workflow.
